Detects AI-generated voice in tab audio using on-device ML

AI Voice Detector tells you whether the voice you're listening to in a browser tab is a real human or an AI-generated synthetic voice. It works on any tab that plays audio — video calls, news clips, podcasts, social posts — and produces a verdict in real time.

How it works
• Click the toolbar icon and choose "Start" on the active tab.
• The extension captures the tab's audio stream locally.
• An on-device machine-learning model analyzes the voice and produces a verdict: human, AI-generated, or probably AI-generated.
• A small overlay in the page shows the live verdict. Stop at any time from the popup.

Everything happens on your device
• No audio ever leaves your computer.
• No recordings are saved.
• No external server receives the audio, inference results, or page content.
• The ML models are bundled inside the extension and run locally in your browser.

What you need
• Chrome (or a Chromium-based browser) with extension support.
• A tab that is currently playing audio.

Permissions, in plain language
• tabCapture — to read the audio from the tab you explicitly ask to analyze.
• offscreen — to run audio decoding and ML inference without freezing the browser.
• activeTab + scripting — to show the verdict overlay on the tab you're analyzing.
• storage — to remember anonymous usage-analytics identifiers for the popup UI.

Important notice — please read

By using the AI Voice Detector, you consent to the real-time analysis of audio played within your browser tab. The tool processes audio locally on your device to determine whether the voice is human or AI-generated. No audio data is stored, recorded, or transmitted to any external servers — all processing occurs entirely on your device.

The AI Voice Detector does not process or analyze biometric data for identification or profiling purposes. It solely analyzes audio to distinguish between human and AI-generated voices. No personal or biometric data is collected, stored, or used.

The AI Voice Detector provides analysis based on an algorithm that classifies audio as human-generated, AI-generated, or probably AI-generated. While designed to be accurate, the tool may not be 100% precise in all cases, particularly in complex or mixed audio environments. Results should be treated as indicative rather than definitive, and users are encouraged to consider the tool's limitations when interpreting the analysis.

Pitch shifting, vocal reduction, and music analysis for the Ralenty / Slow Down practice app

Audio manipulation tools for Slow Down (slowdownpractice.com) — the music and video practice app.

WHAT IT DOES
- Transpose audio up or down by semitones, with fine-tuning by cents
- Reduce or enhance vocals using real-time mid/side processing
- AI vocal separation powered by on-device ONNX neural networks (standard and HQ models)
- Automatic music analysis — detects BPM, key, and chords from the audio
- Practice songs in any key, isolate or remove vocals, and see song info without leaving your browser
- Works with YouTube videos on Slow Down

HOW IT WORKS
1. Open any YouTube video on Slow Down
2. Click the extension icon and enable audio manipulation (or turn on Auto-enable)
3. Use the on-page Audio Manipulation card to adjust pitch, vocal mix, and AI separation

PRIVACY
- Pitch shifting, vocal mix, and AI separation all run entirely in your browser — nothing leaves your device
- AI models run locally using ONNX Runtime WebAssembly, not cloud APIs
- For BPM/key/chord detection, short audio snippets are sent to the Slow Down server for analysis and immediately deleted after processing — they are never stored
- Only activates on Slow Down domains
- No third-party data sharing, no analytics, no tracking

REQUIREMENTS
- A Slow Down account at slowdownpractice.com
- Chrome or any Chromium-based browser (Edge, Brave, Arc, etc.)
Patsa is a real-time AI copilot for meetings that will make you a know-it-all during an online meeting. Get AI answers instantly.

Launch the Patsa extension during a Google Meet/Zoom/Teams meeting. Transcribe other participants' speech and receive additional information and answers to questions from AI in real time.
How it works:
1) Launch the Patsa extension during any online meeting in Chrome.
2) Click the “Start Transcription” button. The speech of other meeting participants will then be transcribed.
3) Select the transcribed text you want to ask the AI to answer and you will receive information from the AI instantly.
Good luck at the meeting!

ReClyp - The All-in-One Screen Recorder & Video Editor

Record your screen. Edit it like magic.
ReClyp lets you capture, edit, polish, and export clean, professional-looking videos without requiring any skill - all directly from your browser.

🎥 Effortless Screen Recording
Start recording in one click. Capture your full screen, a tab, or a window, with or without webcam and mic, with smooth performance and no setup required.

✂️ Smart Editing & Auto Zoom
ReClyp automatically applies smart zooms and let you cut to keep your videos clear and engaging. Trim, arrange, and enhance your recordings in seconds.

🎨 Custom Styling & Polish

No app to install. ReClyp lives in your Chrome toolbar for instant access whenever you need it.

🛂 Free and no registration needed

Whether you’re creating tutorials, product demos, or quick walkthroughs, ReClyp makes screen recording fast, clean, and effortless.
Real-time AI audio transcription from any browser tab. Ultra-fast Soniox ASR with 60+ languages, floating captions, and SRT export.

🎙️ NGN adds real-time subtitles to any video or audio playing in your browser — with instant translation to 61 languages.

Whether you're watching a foreign film, attending a webinar, or learning a new language, NGN transcribes and translates speech directly on the page with Netflix-style captions.

✨ KEY FEATURES:

• Real-time transcription — Live speech-to-text from any browser tab
• 61 languages — Including Arabic, Hebrew, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and more
• Netflix-style subtitles — Clean, complete sentences that appear and disappear naturally
• Subtitle animations — Choose None, Fade, or Slide-up transitions
• Full caption customization — Font size, colors, opacity, blur, bold, lock position
• Draggable & resizable overlay — Position subtitles anywhere on the page
• Export SRT/VTT/TXT — Download subtitles with timestamps for any video player
• Balance calculator — Track your Soniox credit and remaining watch time
• Live session timer — Real-time duration and cost tracking
• Auto language detection — Automatically detects the spoken language
• Speaker identification — Recognizes different speakers
• Keyboard shortcut — Alt+S to toggle recording instantly
• Tab audio passthrough — Original audio plays normally while transcribing

🚀 HOW TO USE:

1. Sign up at soniox.com and get an API key
2. Enter your API key in the extension settings
3. Choose your translation language (optional)
4. Click the record button or press Alt+S on any tab with audio

💰 PRICING:

NGN is free and open source. You only pay for the Soniox API usage:
~$0.12 per hour of real-time transcription and translation.

🔒 PRIVACY:

• No data collection — Zero analytics, tracking, or telemetry
• No storage — Audio streams directly to Soniox, never saved
• Open source — Full code available on GitHub
• Local API key — Stored only on your machine

🛠️ OPEN SOURCE:

GitHub: https://github.com/SoloDax/ngn-transcription
License: MIT

PWRToy is an extension comprising a collection of vanilla JS scripts which provide your browser with custom features. It utilizes only native Manifest V3 APIs and ships with no third-party code.

Audio features:
- Recording - PWRToy provides a simple way to record audio from one of the browser's tabs. Toggle recording on or off with a single button click and save it in `.wav` format.
- Visualizers & Filters - When capturing audio from a tab, you can choose between three different live visualizers: a spectrogram, a volume bar chart, and a waveform graph. These can be cycled through with a click. The visualizers can also be popped out to a separate window, where you can adjust their color and size. Additionally, the extension includes a high-pass and a low-pass filter, which can be controlled with two sliders to remove unwanted frequencies from the sound.
- Volume Duck - Have you ever encountered a website, which played annoyingly loud sounds with no way of turning them down, forcing you to lower the volume in your device's settings? PWRToy has got you covered! Use the Volume Duck feature to configure a volume multiplier for each pesky website.

Mouse Macros:
This feature allows you to record a sequence of mouse clicks on a website and play it back - either once or in a loop. Keyboard shortcuts can be configured to trigger macro playback conveniently. Both the recording and the playback will be maintained across page loads within the same website.

New in v1.4: You can now keep a collection of macros for each website. Recording and playback occur with respect to the macro slot currently selected in the dropdown. Select the "empty" slot to create a new macro, use the pencil icon to name it, and the "X" icon to delete it - simple as that.

Miscellaneous features:
- Maxscroll - This one enables you to quickly traverse a page with lazily loaded content by forcing it to constantly scroll up or down as fast as possible.
- Page CSS - The extension injects any user-provided CSS file into a webpage each time it loads, applying the styles across the entire domain. This can be used to hide unwanted elements or to customize the website's design. After you upload a stylesheet, PWRToy monitors the file for changes as long as the webpage remains open, making it easy to experiment with styles.
- Content Edit - This feature provides a quick way to edit any text on a page without using the developer tools. Simply click the "Content Edit On" button, place your cursor at the desired text location and start typing. Essentially, it activates the `contenteditable` HTML attribute for the entire document body.
- URL Grab - It helps with inspecting, opening, and copying links on web pages. To use it, hold down the Alt key and select any text that contains one or more hyperlinks. A small popup box will appear, containing all the URLs extracted from the selection.

Introducing VerifyLabs.AI Deepfake Detector—a simple and convenient way to check if content is real or AI-generated. 

This revolutionary app uses technology only available to governments and large corporations, so you can verify content any time, anywhere, with up to 98% accuracy.

Colour-coded results reveal whether content is human-made or AI-generated:
Red means: this is definitely AI-generated
Green means: this is definitely human
Grey means: a closer look is recommended.

User benefits:
- Identify and flag content in real time at home or at work in just three clicks
- Easy-to-use design with colour-coded percentage-of-certainty results
- Multi-media application: verify AI threat in images, video and audio
- Read-accuracy of up to 98%
- Real-time diagnosis
- Available for mobile and browser
- Flexible subscriptions or credits top-up available

Disclaimer:
Please note that ‘VerifyLabs.AI” is a trademark owned by VerifyLabsAI Ltd.

While the results generated by VerifyLabsAI Deepfake Detector are generally accurate, there is still a possibility of receiving anomalies or incorrect readings. We do not assume liability for results generated by VerifyLabsAI Deepfake Detector. 

We do not store or share content submitted for verification.

Privacy policy:
https://verifylabs.ai/privacy

Terms and conditions:
https://verifylabs.ai/terms

Record screen, tabs, or custom areas with audio. Edit and trim recordings. Fast, private, and watermark-free.

ScreenGo is a modern, powerful, and easy-to-use screen recording extension for Chrome. Whether you need to record tutorials, gameplay, meetings, or bug reports, ScreenGo has you covered with its versatile recording modes and high-performance area selection tool.

✨ Key Features:

🎥 Versatile Recording Modes
Record your entire screen, a specific application window, or just a Chrome tab.

📐 High-Performance Area Selection
Zero-latency area cropping. Simply drag to select the exact area you want to record.

🎵 Full Audio Support
Record system audio and microphone input simultaneously. Perfect for creating narrated tutorials or recording online meetings.

✂️ Video Trimming & Preview
Preview your recording immediately and use the built-in trimmer to keep only the best parts.

💾 Multi-Format Export
Export your recordings as WebM or MP4 files, ready for sharing on any platform.

🎨 Modern & Clean UI
A beautiful, responsive control panel that can be dragged anywhere on your screen, ensuring it never gets in your way.

🌍 Privacy First
All recordings are processed locally on your computer. No data is ever sent to the cloud.

How to use:
1. Click the ScreenGo icon in your toolbar.
2. Choose to record the current page (with area selection), window, or full screen.
3. Toggle system audio or microphone as needed.
4. Click "Start Recording".
5. After recording, preview, trim, and export as WebM or MP4.

GitHub Repository:
https://github.com/hiawui/screengo
Real-time captions and translation for the audio playing in any browser tab.

Live Caption Translate transcribes the audio playing in any browser tab in
  real time, translates it into the language you choose, and shows it as a
  caption overlay right on the page.

  Lectures, meetings, podcasts, foreign-language videos — add live captions
  and translation to content that has none.

  ■ Features
  - Real-time speech recognition for the audio of any tab
  - Translation into 20 languages, shown alongside the original
  - A clean caption overlay at the bottom of the page (fullscreen-aware)
  - The tab keeps playing its audio normally while captured

  ■ Speech-to-text — choose one of three
  - Deepgram: real-time cloud streaming, lowest latency
  - In-browser Whisper: runs inside the extension, free, no server or key
  - Local Whisper server: free, processed by a server you run yourself

  ■ Translation — choose one of two
  - OpenAI API
  - A local LLM (Ollama, LM Studio, or any OpenAI-compatible server)

  ■ Your keys, your data (BYOK)
  - API keys are stored only in your browser and sent solely to the provider
    they belong to
  - With in-browser Whisper + a local LLM, everything runs locally and free,
    with nothing sent to the cloud

  ■ How to use
  1. Pick your speech-to-text and translation options on the settings page
  2. On a tab with audio, click the extension icon and press "Start captions"
  3. The original and translated captions appear at the bottom of the page

  Note: Browser-internal pages (chrome://, the extension store, etc.) cannot
  be captured.

Zoomix - Screen Recorder with Auto Zoom
Zoomix creates beautiful screen recordings with automatic zoom, webcam capture, and a simple editor for your professional demos.

Zoomix helps you create professional screen recordings with automatic zoom effects, webcam recording, cursor tracking, and a fast built-in editor — all directly inside your browser.

Create polished demos, tutorials, walkthroughs, presentations, coding videos, and team updates without spending hours editing recordings manually.

Zoomix automatically focuses attention on important actions while keeping recordings clean, smooth, and easy to follow.

✨ Features

🎥 Automatic Zoom — Smooth zoom effects automatically focus on clicks and important areas while recording.
🖱️ Cursor Movement Tracking — Keep viewer attention clear with cursor tracking.
🎙️ Record Screen, Webcam & Microphone — Capture your screen, webcam, and voice together in one seamless recording.
✂️ Fast Built-In Editing — Trim, split, and adjust recordings directly inside Zoomix with ease.
🎨 Beautiful Backgrounds & Layouts — Customize your recordings with gradients, padding, and clean presentation styles.
📤 Flexible Export Options — Export videos in multiple quality settings optimized for sharing and presentations.
⚡ Lightweight & Easy to Use — Simple workflow with fast local processing and no complicated setup.

🚀 How It Works

1) Record Your Screen — Click extension icon and start recording your screen, webcam, and microphone in a few clicks. 
2) Edit & Customize — Add zoom effects, trim clips, adjust layouts, and personalize your recording.
3) Export & Share — Export your video in high quality and share it anywhere instantly.

💡 Perfect For

📦 Product Demos — Showcase products, features, and workflows clearly with smooth zoom effects.
💻 Tutorials & Walkthroughs — Create easy-to-follow educational videos and step-by-step guides.
👨‍💻 Coding Videos — Record development workflows, debugging sessions, and technical explanations.
📊 Presentations & Meetings — Share updates, presentations, and async communication professionally.
🎓 Online Teaching — Create engaging lessons and training videos with webcam and voice recording.
🎬 Content Creation — Make polished videos for YouTube, social media, and online communities.

Record screen in crystal quality, edit instantly, and export to WEBM and MP4 locally. No cloud, no accounts, no watermarks.

DemoStep is a fast, private, and simple screen recorder that lets you record, edit, and export videos to WEBM and MP4 – completely locally.

No accounts. No cloud. No limits.

MAIN FEATURES:
• Record screen in crystal clear quality  
• Built-in video editor – trim recordings instantly  
• Export videos to WEBM and MP4 format  
• Remove audio from recordings
• 100% local processing – nothing is uploaded  
• No registration or login  
• No watermarks  
• No recording time limits  

EDIT VIDEOS WITHOUT EXTRA SOFTWARE:
- Trim unwanted parts of your recording  
- Cut mistakes in seconds  
- Remove audio tracks for silent demos 
- Simple, fast workflow – no complex timelines  

PERFECT FOR:
- Creating software demos  
- Reporting bugs with video evidence  
- Recording tutorials  
- Sharing product walkthroughs  
- Customer support explanations  
- Team documentation  
- Quick screen captures  

WHY CHOOSE DEMOSTEP:

Most screen recorders force you to upload videos to the cloud or export in inconvenient formats. DemoStep works differently.

Everything happens on your device:
✓ Instant recording  
✓ Instant editing  
✓ Instant export  
✓ Maximum privacy  

No subscriptions. No hidden limits. No data collection.

PRIVACY FIRST:
• All processing happens locally  
• Videos never leave your computer
